title: CampusConnect
description: A unified platform for CU-UP students to discover clubs, register for events, post projects, and connect with peers across departments — built and maintained by CU-UP.

title: ExamPrep AI
description: An AI-powered exam preparation assistant that generates practice questions, summarizes notes, and provides personalized study plans using LLMs trained on CU syllabus data.

title: CU Lost & Found
description: A campus Lost & Found web app where students can report lost items and claim found ones. Features image upload, real-time notifications, and a search system.

title: CU-CTF Platform
description: A self-hosted Capture The Flag competition platform built for CU-UP CyberSec Club to run internal and inter-college cybersecurity challenges with auto-grading and live scoreboards.

title: RClip
description: A CLI clipboard manager for developers that syncs your clipboard across machines using end-to-end encrypted relay, designed for pair programming and remote dev sessions.

title: SmartAttend
description: An IoT-based smart attendance system using RFID and facial recognition that auto-logs attendance and sends real-time notifications to students and faculty via a web dashboard.

title: DevDaily
description: A daily digest bot that curates top GitHub trending repos, Hacker News articles, and dev blog posts and posts a personalized feed to Discord and Telegram every morning.

title: Eventify
description: A full-featured event management platform for college tech fests — handles registrations, team formation, QR-based check-ins, results publishing, and certificate generation.

title: ML Notebook Hub
description: A curated collection of Jupyter notebooks covering ML algorithms from scratch, with visual explanations and interactive demos — contributed to by students across batches.
